notes: Architecture review green. One new module (broker_connection.py) + edits to pages.py (additive template) + serve_platform.py (new routes) = 3 modules touched, within CTO autonomy. Depends on F006 credentials module (already shipped). MetaTrader5 package is already in requirements.txt; no new dependency. Windows-only nature of the SDK is handled by is_mt5_available() short-circuit -- macOS / Linux dev loop is unblocked.
review_criteria: No new PyPI dependency introduced (MT5 already in requirements)
Rate limit is a memory-only counter -- fine for single-user install
Non-localhost binds gate /api/broker/* through the F006 install-token gate; live-warning route intentionally exempt (read before setup completes)
